title: In Search of a Midnight Kiss
original_title: In Search of a Midnight Kiss
overview: Broke and alone on New Year's Eve, Wilson just wants to spend the rest of a very bad year in bed. But, when his best friend convinces him to post a personal ad, he meets a woman bent on finding the right guy to be with at midnight.
